Ant & Insect Control

We are experts at controlling ants and other tiny insects in and around the home, hire us today.

Reasons for Ant Infestations

Ants require food, water, and a place to nest. They are attracted to sweet and sticky foods, including spills and pet food. Ants may also be attracted to areas where water is readily available, such as leaky pipes or standing water. Ants need a place to nest and may establish colonies in soil, wood piles, or other areas. Urbanization can also disrupt natural habitats and force ants to seek out new nesting sites and sources of food. When it comes to pest control, ants can be one of the most difficult pests to manage. That’s why it’s important to work with a reliable and experienced pest control company to ensure that your Ant infestation is dealt with effectively. Our Pest Control specializes in providing the best ant pest control services in the UK.

How to get rid of ants in UK

Getting rid of ants in the UK involves a combination of cleanliness, prevention, and targeted treatments. Ants are usually attracted to food and sugary substances, so the first step is to keep your home clean and free of crumbs or spills. Wipe down surfaces regularly, store food in sealed containers, and empty bins frequently. Pay special attention to kitchens and areas where food is consumed, as even small traces can attract ants into your home. It’s also important to eliminate moisture sources by fixing leaks and ensuring good ventilation, as some ant species are drawn to damp environments.
